privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.section1_title: I. Identity and Address of the Controller
privacy.section1_text: In compliance with the provisions of the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties, users are informed that the controller of their personal data is OHOPÉRA GARNIER SYSTEMS S.A. DE C.V. (the "Company"), with address at Calle Campeche 410, Interior A, Colonia Hipódromo Condesa, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, C.P. 06170, Mexico City, and contact email conecta@klyro.mx. For the purposes of this Notice, the "Data Subject" shall be understood as the individual to whom the personal data collected by the Company pertains, including —but not limited to— website users, clients and prospects, representatives and/or contacts designated by corporate clients, training or event participants, job applicants, and individual suppliers.
privacy.section2_text: The personal data that the Company may request from users includes, but is not limited to:
section2_list: Information necessary for the provision of development, technology integration, or training services.
privacy.section3_text: The personal data collected will be used for the following primary purposes:
section3_primary: Provision of software development, applications, business systems, testing, integrations, and training services.
Billing and administrative management of contracted services.
Direct communication with the client, including inquiries, technical support, updates, and project follow-up.
Compliance with legal and contractual obligations arising from the relationship between the Company and the user.
privacy.section3_secondary_text: Additionally, and provided the data subject does not object, the data may be used for secondary purposes such as:
section3_secondary: Sending promotional information about new products, services, or updates.
Invitations to courses, webinars, training, and events organized by the Company.
Internal analysis and metrics for continuous service improvement.
privacy.section4_text: The Company will not share users' personal data with third parties without their consent, except in the following cases:
section4_list: When necessary to fulfill contractual obligations.
When there is a legal mandate or a substantiated request from a competent authority.
When the transfer is necessary to safeguard security, public interest, or the defense of a right.
privacy.section5_text: The Company adopts reasonable administrative, technical, and physical measures to protect personal data against loss, alteration, destruction, or unauthorized access. However, the user acknowledges that no system is completely secure, and therefore the Company cannot guarantee the absence of security breaches caused by external factors.
privacy.section6_text: The data subject may exercise their rights of Access, Rectification, Cancellation, and Opposition (ARCO) at any time by sending a written request to conecta@klyro.mx, which must contain at least:
section6_list: Full name of the data subject.
Clear description of the data on which they wish to exercise ARCO rights.
Address or electronic means for receiving notifications.
privacy.section6_response: The Company will respond within a maximum of 20 business days from receipt of the request, notifying the data subject of the outcome.
privacy.section7_text: At any time, the data subject may withdraw the consent granted for the processing of their personal data, provided this does not imply a breach of legal or contractual obligations. The request must be sent to the contact email and will be processed in accordance with the procedure established for exercising ARCO rights.
privacy.section8_title: VIII. Use of Cookies and Similar Technologies
privacy.section8_text: The Website may use cookies, web beacons, and similar technologies for the purpose of improving user experience, analyzing browsing patterns, and facilitating functionalities. The user may disable the use of these technologies through their browser settings, although this may affect the proper functioning of the Website.
privacy.section9_title: IX. Modifications to the Privacy Notice
privacy.section9_text: The Company reserves the right to update or modify this Privacy Notice at any time to adapt it to legislative, regulatory, or internal changes. Any modification will be published on the Website klyro.mx in the corresponding section, taking effect upon publication.
privacy.section10_text: For any questions or clarifications regarding this Privacy Notice, as well as to exercise the rights conferred by law, the data subject may contact
privacy.section10_text2: or go to the address located at Calle Campeche 410, Interior A, Colonia Hipódromo Condesa, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, C.P. 06170, Mexico City.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.section1_text: This document governs access to and use of the website klyro.mx (hereinafter, the "Website"), as well as the contractual relationships that arise between users and OHOPÉRA GARNIER SYSTEMS S.A. DE C.V., with address at Calle Campeche 410, Int. A, Colonia Hipódromo Condesa, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, C.P. 06170, Mexico City, and contact email conecta@klyro.mx. Use of the Website implies that the user acknowledges having read, understood, and fully accepted the provisions contained in these Terms and Conditions, this document constituting a legally binding agreement.
terms.section2_text: Through the Website, the Company makes available to users technological development and training solutions, including, among others, the design and construction of applications, specialized software, inventory and logistics systems, platform integration, quality testing, and training programs in various systems and programming languages. Each contracted service shall be governed by the proposal or quote accepted by the client, which shall detail the technical scope, execution timelines, and applicable total cost.
terms.section3_text: Published or quoted prices shall be expressed in Mexican pesos (MXN) and subject to Value Added Tax (VAT) at 16%. The Company shall issue corresponding invoices based on the tax information provided by the client, who shall be responsible for the accuracy of the data provided. The Company reserves the right to update its rates without prior notice, although such adjustments shall not affect services that have already been formally accepted and paid for.
terms.section4_text: Payment for services must be made through the mechanisms authorized on the Website or in accordance with the instructions expressly communicated by the Company. The commencement of any project shall be conditional upon confirmation of the corresponding payment. In the event of deferred payment arrangements, the client's failure to comply shall entitle the Company to suspend the execution of services without any liability, until the situation is regularized.
terms.section5_text: The Company undertakes to deliver the services in accordance with the accepted proposal. In turn, the client must provide in a timely manner all information, documentation, and materials necessary for the proper execution of the project. The omission or delay in the delivery of such inputs by the client may generate delays exclusively attributable to the client, without this being considered a breach by the Company.
terms.section6_text: Minor changes shall be understood as included in the contract, such as typographical corrections, color adjustments, fonts, or replacement of images provided by the client. However, any modification involving a change of concept, expansion of scope, creation of additional deliverables, or adjustments after final approval shall be subject to a new quote, the cost of which shall be determined based on complexity and required resources.
terms.section7_text: In the event that the client requests cancellation of a service before it begins, please read our Refund Policy available on our Website. All requests must be made in writing to conecta@klyro.mx, accompanied by the contracting details and the reasons supporting the request.
terms.section8_text: The economic rights to developments, source codes, training materials, and other deliverables shall remain the property of the Company until the client pays the agreed price in full. Upon full payment, such rights shall be transferred to the client, with the exception of those components subject to third-party licenses. The Company reserves the right to reference executed projects in its institutional portfolio, provided this does not involve the disclosure of confidential information.
terms.section9_text: The user agrees to use the Website responsibly, lawfully, and in accordance with applicable regulations. It is prohibited to use the Site for illegal purposes, introduce malicious software, or perform any action that affects its normal operation. The Company may restrict or cancel access to users who violate these provisions, without prejudice to corresponding legal actions.
terms.section10_text: The Company does not guarantee the continuous and uninterrupted availability of the Website, nor is it responsible for technical failures, errors, or interruptions arising from fortuitous events, force majeure, or circumstances beyond its control. Likewise, it shall not assume liability for indirect losses, lost profits, or consequential damages that may arise from the use of the Site or contracted services. The Company's maximum liability, in any case, shall be limited to the amount actually paid by the client for the specific service.
terms.section11_text: Information provided by the client during the contractual relationship shall be treated as strictly confidential. The Company shall refrain from disclosing it or using it for purposes other than project execution, unless there is express client consent or a legal mandate requiring it.
terms.section12_text: These Terms and Conditions shall be interpreted and governed in accordance with the laws of the United Mexican States. For any dispute, the parties agree to submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Mexico City, expressly waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them by reason of their present or future domicile.
terms.section13_text: For any communication related to these Terms and Conditions, the user may contact the Company via email at
terms.section13_text2: or by correspondence sent to our address at
terms.section13_text3: Calle Campeche 410, Interior A, Colonia Hipódromo Condesa, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, C.P. 06170, Mexico City. The Company shall address requests, questions, or clarifications within a reasonable time, always striving to provide a clear, timely response in accordance with applicable law.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.section1_text: This policy governs the cases in which clients of OHOPÉRA GARNIER SYSTEMS S.A. DE C.V. (hereinafter, the "Company"), with address at Calle Campeche 410, Interior A, Colonia Hipódromo Condesa, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, C.P. 06170, Mexico City, may request the cancellation of services and, where applicable, the refund of previously paid amounts. This policy applies to all services contracted through the Website klyro.mx, via email conecta@klyro.mx, or through direct agreements with the Company.
refund.section2_text: The client acknowledges that, given the nature of the services offered by the Company —mainly custom technological developments, online training, and personalized solutions—, refunds are not automatic and will be subject to the terms set forth in this policy. All requests must be made in writing via conecta@klyro.mx, clearly stating the reasons for cancellation and providing the information needed to identify the corresponding contract or service.
refund.section3_text: When the cancellation request is made before the service has formally begun, the client may be eligible for a partial refund, which shall be calculated by deducting a percentage corresponding to administrative, operational, and management expenses. Such refund shall be processed within a maximum of 20 business days from the validation of the request.
refund.section4_text: In cases where the project or training has already begun, no refund shall apply, unless there is a breach directly attributable to the Company that prevents the proper provision of the contracted service. In this case, the Company may choose to:
refund.section4_option1: Refund the client an amount proportional to the unexecuted portion of the service, or
refund.section4_option2: Offer an equivalent alternative or corrective solution, subject to the client's acceptance.
refund.section5_title: V. Cases Where Refunds Do Not Apply
refund.section5_text: No refund of any kind shall apply in the following cases:

section5_list.0: When the cancellation is due to the client's failure to provide information, documentation, or materials.
section5_list.1: When scope changes, additional deliverables, or modifications not contemplated in the original proposal are requested.
section5_list.2: When the client breaches the agreed payment schemes.
section5_list.3: When the training has already been started or partially or fully consumed.

refund.section6_text: The client must send an email to conecta@klyro.mx with the subject "Refund Request", including:

section6_list.0: Full name of the holder or company name of the contracting party.
section6_list.1: Contract number, invoice, or payment reference.
section6_list.3: Reason for cancellation or refund request.

refund.section6_response: Upon receipt of the request, the Company shall confirm acknowledgment and evaluate the case within a maximum of 10 business days, notifying the client of the corresponding resolution.
refund.section7_text: If applicable, the refund shall be made by bank transfer to the account designated by the client, provided it matches the holder who made the original payment. When the payment was made by credit card, debit card, or through an authorized payment gateway, the Company may make the refund directly to the same payment method, subject to the timelines and procedures established by the issuing bank. The client acknowledges that such timelines may vary depending on each financial institution and that the Company shall not be responsible for delays attributable to the bank or payment service provider.
refund.section8_text: For questions, clarifications, or requests related to this policy, the client may contact
refund.section8_text2: or visit the Company's address at Calle Campeche 410, Interior A, Colonia Hipódromo Condesa, Alcaldía Cuauhtémoc, C.P. 06170, Mexico City.
